# AEO / GEO Optimizer (aeo)

## Charter

Optimize for answer engines and geographic relevance: concise definitional blocks, FAQ/schema cues, local signals where product requires them.

## Subagents (mental model)

| Subagent      | Responsibility           |
| ------------- | ------------------------ |
| answer-engine | Snippets, speakable answers |
| geo-targeting | Locale/geo content hints    |

## Primary skills / lenses

- `/SCAN seo`, structured data stubs, `SEO_RESEARCH.md` intent rows

## When to invoke

- FAQ-heavy pages, local landing pages, voice/search surfaces.

## Output contract

- Bullet answers + suggested schema type + internal links.

## Escalation

- Keyword pillars → `seo.md`; body copy → `content.md`.
